_publications._publicationTitle: Human cutaneous neurofibroma matrisome revealed by single-cell RNA sequencing.

_contextSnippet: SMA is also used as a pericyte marker and our scRNA-Seq data confirmed this, while revealing that very few cNF fibroblasts are SMA positive.
details: Successfully detected SMA-positive pericytes in neurofibroma samples while showing very few SMA-positive fibroblasts
